zh.lifeSummary: Thierry de Pottes是Gerard Lambersart的兒子，出生。他和Berthe Lambersart至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thierry de Pottes是Gerard Lambersart的儿子，出生。他和Berthe Lambersart至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pottes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Alvaro, Ana, Jorge, Alberto, Amancio, Anselmo, Avelino, Belmira, Carlos, Luis.  Portuguese Joao, Serafim.
Portuguese and Galician: habitational name from any of numerousplaces in Portugal named Pontes, from the plural of ponte‘bridge’.

variants.name: Puentes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jesus, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Francisco, Alicia, Julio, Luis, Roberto, Angel, Guadalupe.
Spanish: habitational name from any of various places called Puentes, from the plural of puente ‘bridge’.

nameMeanings.name: Thierry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Germanic Theodoric, composed of elements meaning ‘people’ and ‘rule’. Compare Terry .

en.lifeSummary: Thierry de Pottes was born as the son of Gerard Lambersart. He had at least 1 son with Berthe Lambersart.

fr.lifeSummary: Thierry de Pottes est né, fils de Gerard Lambersart. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Berthe Lambersart.

de.lifeSummary: Thierry de Pottes wurde, als Sohn von Gerard Lambersart geboren. Er hatte mit Berthe Lambersart mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Thierry de Pottes è nato il come figlio di Gerard Lambersart. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Berthe Lambersart.

ja.lifeSummary: Thierry de PottesはGerard Lambersartの息子として生まれた。彼はBerthe Lambersartとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Thierry de Pottes(은)는 Gerard Lambersart의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Berthe Lambersart(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thierry de Pottes nasceu filho de Gerard Lambersart. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Berthe Lambersart.

ru.lifeSummary: Thierry de Pottes родился. Его отца звали Gerard Lambersart. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Berthe Lambersart.

es.lifeSummary: Thierry de Pottes nació como hijo de Gerard Lambersart. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Berthe Lambersart.
